name: Dumbbell Row (Single Arm)
setup: Place one knee and hand on flat bench
Other foot planted on floor, hip-width stance
Dumbbell in free hand, arm fully extended
execution: Pull dumbbell to hip / lower ribcage
Elbow drives back, squeeze lat at top
Lower under control to full stretch
common_mistakes: Using momentum instead of controlled pull
cues: Pull the dumbbell like you're starting a lawnmower
Squeeze your armpit at the top
advantages: Great stretch and contraction per side
Doesn't load spine as much as barbell row
progression: Increase dumbbell weight or use straps for grip
